# Integration Points

**Purpose**: Document where new features connect to existing systems

**Format**: One feature/component per section

---

## How to Document an Integration Point

```markdown
## [Feature Name] Integration

**Entry point**: [Where does code hook in?]
**Key files**:
- [File 1]: [What changes?]
- [File 2]: [What changes?]

**Contracts to respect**:
- [Contract 1]: [What must be true?]
- [Contract 2]: [What format is required?]

**Gotchas to avoid**: [References to legacy-system-watchouts.md]

**Example flow**:
[How does data flow through the integration?]

**Effort estimate**: [Hours based on complexity]
```
